mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lost_found(user_id, item_type, category_id, title, content, location, date, status, contact_phone, created_at, updated_at) values (#{userId}, #{itemType}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{location}, #{date}, #{status}, #{contactPhone}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE lost_found SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, location = #{location}, date = #{date}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lost_found WHERE status = 1 AND created_at <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
